fields.name: Activity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of warehouse activity for the line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of source document to which the warehouse activity line relates, such as sales, purchase, and production.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source subtype of the document related to the warehouse request.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Subline No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source subline number.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where the activity occurs.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Sorting Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that is used to sort the warehouse activity lines.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number of the item to be handled, such as picked or put away.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies an extended description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item to be handled, such as received, put-away, or assigned.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item to be handled, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items that have not yet been handled for this warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items, expressed in the base unit of measure, that have not yet been handled for this warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units to handle in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. to Handle (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items to be handled in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. Handled
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items on the line that have been handled in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Qty. Handled (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of items on the line that have been handled in this warehouse activity.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice, informing whether partial deliveries are acceptable, copied from the source document header.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies information about the type of destination, such as customer or vendor, associated with the warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or code of the customer, vendor or location related to the activity line.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent is used to transport the products.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that represents the default shipping agent service.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when the warehouse activity is scheduled to start.
The field is automatically filled based on the source document type.


Source document


Description


Sales order

Shipment date on the sales order line


Purchase order

Planned receipt date on the purchase order line


Transfer order

Work date


Production order

Work date


Assembly order

Work date
Note


If assembled to order, then the shipment date on the sales order line applies.

fields.name: Assemble to Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the inventory pick line is for assembly items that are assembled to a sales order before being shipped.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number to handle in the document.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number to handle in the document.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the warranty date of the serial/lot numbers if you are putting items away.
If you are moving or picking items, the field is read-only.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date of the serial/lot numbers if you are putting items away.

fields.name: Serial No. Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number is blocked, on its information card.

fields.name: Lot No. Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number is blocked, on its information card.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number to handle in the document.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the zone code where the bin on this line is located.

fields.name: Action Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the action type for the warehouse activity line.

fields.name: Whse. Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of warehouse document from which the line originated.

fields.name: Whse. Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the warehouse document that is the basis for the action on the line.

fields.name: Whse. Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line in the warehouse document that is the basis for the action on the line.

fields.name: Bin Ranking
fields.tooltip:
Contains the rank of the bin on the line.
For information about how and why to rank bins, see the Bin Ranking field in the Bin table

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cubage of items on the line, calculated based on the Quantity field.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the equipment required when you perform the action on the line.

fields.name: Bin Type Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the bin type of the bin on the line. The bin type determines how the program will use the bin in warehouse activities related to the inbound and outbound flow of items.

fields.name: Breakbulk No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Original Breakbulk
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if a line is a breakbulk line that can be hidden.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Breakbulk
fields.tooltip:
If the breakbulk lines are be hidden, the program fills in this field with the value of the Original Breakbulk field.

This field is used internally.

fields.name: Cross-Dock Information
fields.tooltip: Specifies an option for specific information regarding the cross-dock activity.

fields.name: Dedicated
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the bin is used as a dedicated bin, which means that its bin content is only available to certain resources.

fields.name: Over-Receipt Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies over-receipt quantity.

fields.name: Over-Receipt Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies over-receipt code.

fields.name: Warehouse Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason for the warehouse activity.
